title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: A classic Roman pasta dish with crispy guanciale, eggs, and Pecorino Romano.
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook spaghetti until al dente.
Cut guanciale into small strips and cook in a large pan over medium heat until crispy and golden.
In a bowl, whisk together egg yolks with finely grated Pecorino Romano and plenty of black pepper.
When the pasta is ready, reserve 1 cup of pasta water. Drain the pasta and add it to the guanciale pan (heat off).
Pour the egg and cheese mixture over the pasta, tossing quickly. Add splashes of pasta water to create a creamy sauce.
Serve immediately with extra Pecorino and black pepper on top.
